classObjective: Calculate the surface area and volume of prisms, cylinders, pyramids, and cones.
workedExamples: 11-5, Example 3 — Find Surface Area and Volume of Prisms and Cylinders
11-5, Example 4 — Find Surface Area and Volume of Pyramids and Cones
11-5, Example 5 — Solve Real-World Problems with Surface Area and Volume
warmUp: What is the volume formula for a rectangular prism?
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: SA and V formulas for prisms, cylinders, pyramids, cones; real-world application of 3D measurement
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice calculating surface area and volume of 3D solids
independentPractice: Practice problems finding surface area and volume of prisms, cylinders, pyramids, and cones
assessment: Exit ticket: find both the surface area and volume of a right circular cylinder with radius 3 and height 7
capReflection: How does the volume of a cone compare to the volume of a cylinder with the same base and height?
